netherite_glider.title: Craft the Netherite Glider (Gliders mod) — the highest tier glider, better glide ratio than Elytra in flat flight

lightning_warning.title: Survive a thunderstorm while wearing the Netherite Glider — lightning destroys Gliders permanently (no repair)

subtitle.text: The highest tier glider. Better flat-flight than Elytra. And if lightning hits it, it is gone permanently — no repair.

description: CH.17 · THE NETHERITE GLIDER
▸ The Gliders mod adds tier-based gliders from wood through Netherite.',
Each tier glides further and falls slower.',
The Netherite Glider is the final tier.',
It has a better flat-flight glide ratio than Elytra in a straight line.',
It does not need Firework Rockets for sustained horizontal travel.',
But: if lightning strikes it, the Glider is destroyed permanently.',
No Mending. No repair. It is gone.',
◈ NETHERITE GLIDER
└ Recipe: check JEI for gliders: netherite variant',
Likely: previous tier glider + Netherite Ingot upgrade',
└ Equip: placed in Chest armor slot (replaces Elytra slot)',
Choose: Elytra (rocket-powered) OR Glider (unpowered, glide only)',
Most players keep both and swap situationally',
└ Glide ratio: Netherite Glider maintains altitude longer per fall',
Better for: crossing flat terrain, safe landing from height',
Worse than Elytra for: long-distance speed travel, void crossing',
◈ LIGHTNING DESTRUCTION — CRITICAL WARNING
└ Lightning strike on player while wearing Glider: DESTROYS GLIDER',
No repair mechanic. No Mending. The item is deleted.',
└ Risk factor: thunderstorms happen in Serene Seasons',
and Immersive Weathering adds additional weather events',
└ Prevention:',
1. Lightning Rod on base roof — attracts lightning away from you',
2. Stay indoors during thunderstorms with Glider equipped',
3. Swap to Elytra during thunderstorms (Elytra is not destroyed)',
4. Totem of Undying: does NOT protect Glider (item durability, not HP)',
└ Cost of replacement: another Netherite Ingot + craft chain',
Not devastating, but inconvenient at the worst times',
◈ ELYTRA VS GLIDER USE CASES
└ Elytra: long-range speed travel, void crossing, combat',
└ Netherite Glider: short hops, safe descent from mountains,',
terrain traversal without rocket fuel cost',
└ Keep both: swap based on weather and activity',
▸ The previous civilizations fell from the sky.',
Not because they had no wings.',
Because their wings were not made from the right material.',
The Netherite Glider is as tough as the dimension it is named for.',
It survives everything except lightning.',
That is one specific threat.',
Build a Lightning Rod.',
Survive the rest.',
▶ Craft the Netherite Glider [check]
▶ Survive a thunderstorm safely (land, shelter, or Lightning Rod) [check]
◇ Lightning Rod placement: highest point of your base roof.',
One rod covers a 16-block radius against lightning strikes.',
Multiple rods for larger builds.',
The rod is vanilla — no modded requirement.',
1 Copper Ingot × 3 stacked = Lightning Rod.
Build it now.
